paper_focus.title: Evolution of microstructure, texture and mechanical properties of Fe–30Mn–11Al–1.2C low-density steel during cold rolling
paper_focus.research_objective: To systematically investigate the microstructure and texture evolution as well as the mechanical properties of Fe–30Mn–11Al–1.2C (wt%) low-density steel during cold rolling up to 90% thickness reduction.
main_process_variables: Uniaxial tensile test (room temperature, initial strain rate 10^-3 s^-1)
